violations.text: The date when the last shellfish was used from the bag must be noted on the shellfish tag. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 11/05/2025

Raw animal foods such as raw shelled eggs were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods such as tomato sauce and fried eggplant in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/05/2025

Tomato sauce which was prepared in advance, was not cooled to 70 degrees Fahrenheit in 2 hours and then to 41 degrees Fahrenheit within 4 hours. Food was voluntarily disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/05/2025

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Tomato sauce was placed observed at 57-60 degrees Fahrenheit in the refrigerator in 5 gallon cambros. Foods were voluntarily disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/05/2025

The condensate from the 2 door refrigeration unit is draining into the basin of the kitchen handsink. Condensate drainage and other non-sewage liquids must in a proper manner. New Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils ( slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 05/12/2023
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair. (Walk in Freezer) - Gaskets must be maintained in good repair New Violation. Correct By: 05/12/2023

The cutting boards in the kitchen are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 05/12/2023

The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the sanitizing solution for the 3 bay and thermolabels to measure the temperature of the dish washing machine. New Violation. Correct By: 05/12/2023
